rules: Special Locking uses standard tool-row nested structure
Summary uses standard tool-row nested structure inside standalone category summary section

toolCards.title: Special Locking / High-Security Scope
toolCards.description: Review special locking and high-security door conditions before code and AHJ coordination.

summaryCards.title: Access Control Summary
summaryCards.description: Review saved tool guidance, check the category rollup, and open the final report from one category-level page.
summaryCards.sectionDescription: Use the summary after the tool path is planned. It rolls up saved Access Control guidance and hosts the final report workflow.
